body:
Fixed:
1. Two player buffs are still displayed in Chinese
2. Boss intent display should only show status orbs
3. Multiple buff selections will exceed the border; add a scaling function
4. The +5 HP buff after retrying a floor will not take effect
5. All enhancements are unique, once selected, they cannot be selected again
title: fix: rogue buff stackable, boss intent display, buff panel collapsibl…
